steps.prompt: Show my projects
New project: QWE-TestProject, site is easystaff.io
Which services are connected?
How can I gather companies?
Show me available email accounts for campaigns
Any warm replies?
What is the cost estimate?
I want to set up lead generation campaigns
Here's my token: mcp_xxx...
Our company is EasyStaff, website easystaff.io. My name is Eleonora, I'm BDM
What API keys do I need to connect?
All campaigns including 'petr' in their names are my campaigns
Find IT consulting companies in Miami and video production companies in London
Launch the pipeline for both segments
Run the full pipeline — blacklist, scrape, and analyze all gathered companies
Use the Eleonora accounts, the ones from petr campaigns
Create the sequence and campaign in SmartLead
Which leads need follow-ups? And which replies are warm?
Do I have any pending campaigns? What's their status?
Can you find 10 more targets for the IT consulting pipeline?
Process the new companies — blacklist, scrape, and analyze them
Show me the sequence for the IT consulting campaign
Update the first email subject to: {{first_name}} — contractors abroad?
The tone is too formal, make it more casual and friendly
arcee.ai is actually a consulting firm, make it a target
I checked the test email, looks good. What campaigns are pending?
Go ahead, activate the IT consulting campaign
Same email accounts as my petr campaigns — the eleonora ones
Build the email sequence based on our best practices
The sequence is fine, go ahead
Push to SmartLead with those email accounts
Test email received, sequence looks great
Activate
Create campaign for the pipeline targets
Use GetSales for LinkedIn outreach
List GetSales sender profiles
Generate the LinkedIn flow
Looks good, approve the flow
Push to GetSales
Show me my status
How many companies did we find?
How are my campaigns doing? Any replies?
List the warm replies
Any leads I should follow up with?
Open in CRM
Did anyone ask for a meeting?
How many credits will I spend?
Show me my Apollo credit usage
How many contacts do I have?
Show me only EasyStaff-Global contacts
List campaigns
Turn off reply tracking for petr
Turn monitoring back on
Turn on monitoring for all my campaigns
I'm from The Fashion People (thefashionpeople.com), need to find fashion brands in Italy
I don't have any SmartLead campaigns yet
Look for e-commerce fashion brands based in Italy
Run blacklist and analysis
Send from elnar@thefashionpeopletech.com
New project for onsocial.ai — looking for influencer marketing platforms in the UK
mcp_services_test_token
Select project Result
Here's my company list as CSV: /data/take-test-100.csv. I want to segment by fashion/apparel vs other.
Here's my classification: VALID if fashion brand/clothing manufacturer in LATAM. NOT_VALID if marketing agency, logistics, pure retail.
Check the blacklist for this project
Run pre-filter, scrape websites, and classify
Approve
Analyze this sheet too: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgVE2upms/edit
Add to existing pipeline
Blacklist check for the sheet import
Scrape and analyze the new companies
Approve targets
Last batch — files in this folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1bBZFN5Yg2qe7VGj_LATAM_batches
Add to the existing pipeline, don't create a new one
Blacklist check please
Pre-filter, scrape, analyze
Approve
I need multi-step classification: 1) Segment by business type (fashion brand, textile producer, retailer, other), 2) Drop others, 3) Tag by size.
Go ahead with those prompts
How many in each segment?
Approve targets
How many companies do we have in the Result project?
Create a new project called TestProjectB targeting IT consulting in London
Gather companies for TestProjectB from this CSV: /data/test_overlap.csv
Add the CSV data again to Result project: /data/take-test-100.csv
Gather fashion companies in Argentina
Find fashion brands in Colombia, about 50 targets
I have a CSV file with my leads
Check this doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1abc123/edit
I have /data/batch1.csv and also this sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/abc123/edit
Hey, I need some data
Check these domains: easystaff.io, inxydigital.com, getsally.io
Add a column that classifies companies by size: LARGE if 100+ employees, MEDIUM if 20-99, SMALL if under 20
Show me the pipeline
Delete the size classification
Switch to iteration 1
Add business_model column: BRAND if they sell own brand, MANUFACTURER if they produce for others
Looks good, run it
Actually remove business_model, I don't need it
Show me all iterations
New project: OnSocial UK, site onsocial.com, UK influencer/creator platforms

How many companies in Result?
Switch to OnSocial UK
Gather creator economy companies in the UK
